Brendan O’Hara MP questions the Foreign Secretary over the situation in Gaza

Published: 11 January 2024

Categories: News

11 January 202411 January 2024

Tuesday 9th January 2024 was the first opportunity for the Foreign Affairs Select Committee to question the new Foreign Secretary David Cameron, on the situation in Gaza. You can see here the full exchange I had when I questioned him on whether he thought Israel had broken International Humanitarian law.

Categories News
